R

Rachel Grossman

Paid Search Director

LinkedIn

About

With over a decade of experience in paid search, Rachel brings a passion for the work that is matched by her passion for people development and culture creation. She has successfully mentored and empowered cross-functional teams, fostering collaboration and a shared commitment to achieving ambitious goals and business objectives. Her mission is to leverage her expertise and passion to drive growth and innovation for BPD and it's clients. Outside of work, she loves to spend time with her family and friends, exploring the Cuyahoga Valley National Park that is right in her backyard, checking out new local breweries, and attempting to learn to golf (although she is a bit more Happy Gilmore than Rory Mcllroy). She loves all things Cleveland sports, and spending time at Lake Erie!

Fun Fact

Rachel will respond with a meme or movie quote (usually Mean Girls) whenever possible.
